SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.id

クラス Cuid2IdGenerator

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.id.Cuid2IdGenerator
すべての実装されたインタフェース:
IdGenerator<String>
public final class Cuid2IdGenerator extends Object implements IdGenerator<String>
IdGenerator for Cuid2-compatible strings: SHA3-512 over UTF-8 inputs, base36, a per-instance session counter, a fixed fingerprint (entropy-derived by default), and a leading random lowercase letter. Each generate() reads Clock.instant() for Unix milliseconds (UuidV7-compatible bounds).

The default fingerprint matches the reference when no global object keys exist (see Cuid2.createDefaultFingerprint(RandomGenerator)). It will not match Node.js fingerprints built from Object.keys(global).

Cuid2 is intentionally not k-sortable; use Ulid / UlidIdGenerator or UuidV7 when you need coarse time order in encoded form.

The no-argument and secure-default constructors use RandomGeneratorFactory .of("SecureRandom"). When a generator is supplied, thread safety matches that of the given generator; if it is not thread-safe, callers must synchronize externally or confine use to one thread.

Static nonCryptographic() and nonCryptographic(int) use a SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator; see the API note below.

API note: nonCryptographic() methods prioritize speed over cryptographic unpredictability and are unsuitable for secrets, session identifiers in hostile environments, or other security-sensitive identifiers unless you deliberately accept weaker entropy.

This class validates contracts on construction and rejects empty custom fingerprints with IllegalArgumentException.

Public constructors validate references with NullPointerException when null is not permitted.

導入されたバージョン:
0.2.0

  • コンストラクタの概要

    コンストラクタ
    コンストラクタ
    説明
    Cuid2IdGenerator()
    Uses Cuid2.DEFAULT_LENGTH, Clock.systemUTC(), and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
    Cuid2IdGenerator(int length)
    Uses Clock.systemUTC() and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
    Cuid2IdGenerator(int length, @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
    Uses the given length, RandomGenerator, and Clock.systemUTC().
    Cuid2IdGenerator(int length, @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator, @NonNull Clock clock)
    Uses the given length, RandomGenerator, and Clock.
    Cuid2IdGenerator(int length, @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator, @NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull String fingerprint)
    Uses a caller-supplied fingerprint (for example to match a deployment-specific value) with the given length, RandomGenerator, and Clock.
    Cuid2IdGenerator(int length, @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator, @NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull String fingerprint, long initialCounter)
    Uses a caller-supplied fingerprint and explicit initial counter (for deterministic tests).

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    @NonNull String
    generate()
    Generates a new Cuid2-compatible id.
    static @NonNull Cuid2IdGenerator
    nonCryptographic()
    Returns a generator with Cuid2.DEFAULT_LENGTH, Clock.systemUTC(), and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
    static @NonNull Cuid2IdGenerator
    nonCryptographic(int length)
    Returns a generator with the given length, Clock.systemUTC(), and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.

    クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • Cuid2IdGenerator

      public Cuid2IdGenerator()
      Uses Cuid2.DEFAULT_LENGTH, Clock.systemUTC(), and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • Cuid2IdGenerator

      public Cuid2IdGenerator(int length)
      Uses Clock.systemUTC() and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      length - output length (2–32)
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - if length is out of range
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • Cuid2IdGenerator

      public Cuid2IdGenerator(int length, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
      Uses the given length, RandomGenerator, and Clock.systemUTC().
      パラメータ:
      length - output length (2–32)
      randomGenerator - entropy source, must not be null
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if randomGenerator is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if length is out of range
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • Cuid2IdGenerator

      public Cuid2IdGenerator(int length, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator, @NonNull @NonNull Clock clock)
      Uses the given length, RandomGenerator, and Clock. The initial counter sample and default fingerprint are drawn from randomGenerator in the same order as init in the reference implementation.
      パラメータ:
      length - output length (2–32)
      randomGenerator - entropy source, must not be null
      clock - clock for Unix milliseconds, must not be null
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if length is out of range
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • Cuid2IdGenerator

      public Cuid2IdGenerator(int length, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator, @NonNull @NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull @NonNull String fingerprint)
      Uses a caller-supplied fingerprint (for example to match a deployment-specific value) with the given length, RandomGenerator, and Clock. The initial counter value is floor(random * Cuid2.INITIAL_COUNT_MAX) per the reference.
      パラメータ:
      length - output length (2–32)
      randomGenerator - entropy source, must not be null
      clock - clock for Unix milliseconds, must not be null
      fingerprint - non-empty string concatenated into the hash input, must not be null
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if length is out of range or fingerprint is empty
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • Cuid2IdGenerator

      public Cuid2IdGenerator(int length, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator, @NonNull @NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull @NonNull String fingerprint, long initialCounter)
      Uses a caller-supplied fingerprint and explicit initial counter (for deterministic tests). Does not draw an initial-counter sample from randomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      length - output length (2–32)
      randomGenerator - entropy source for letters and salt, must not be null
      clock - clock for Unix milliseconds, must not be null
      fingerprint - non-empty string concatenated into the hash input, must not be null
      initialCounter - first value returned by the session counter's getAndIncrement
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any reference argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if length is out of range or fingerprint is empty
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

  • メソッドの詳細

    • nonCryptographic

      @NonNull public static @NonNull Cuid2IdGenerator nonCryptographic()
      Returns a generator with Cuid2.DEFAULT_LENGTH, Clock.systemUTC(), and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
      戻り値:
      a non-null generator
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • nonCryptographic

      @NonNull public static @NonNull Cuid2IdGenerator nonCryptographic(int length)
      Returns a generator with the given length, Clock.systemUTC(), and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      length - output length (2–32)
      戻り値:
      a non-null generator
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - if length is out of range
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • generate

      @NonNull public @NonNull String generate()
      Generates a new Cuid2-compatible id.
      定義:
      generate インタフェース内 IdGenerator<String>
      戻り値:
      a non-null string of length configured at construction
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the clock instant is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0
